failed_attempts:
have : 35 * n % 17 = n % 17 := by rw [Nat.mul_mod, show 35 % 17 = 1 by rfl, one_mul, Nat.mod_mod]
  rw [← this, show 35 = 7 * 5 by rfl, mul_assoc, Nat.mul_mod_right, h₀]

  rwa [← mul_assoc, mul_mod, show 35 % 17 = 1 by rfl, one_mul, mod_mod] at h

have h : 35 * n % 17 = n % 17 := by

  rw [← h, show 35 = 7 * 5 by rfl, mul_assoc, Nat.mul_mod_right, h₀]

  rwa [← mul_assoc, show 7 * 5 = 35 by rfl, Nat.mul_mod, show 35 % 17 = 1 by rfl, one_mul, Nat.mod_mod, show 56 % 17 = 5 by rfl] at h

  rw [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.mod_mod, ← Nat.mul_mod, mul_assoc, Nat.mul_mod,
      show 35 % 17 = 1 by rfl, one_mul, Nat.mod_mod,
      show 7 * 8 = 56 by rfl, show 56 % 17 = 5 by rfl] at h
  exact h

have h := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 7 h₀
  rw [mul_assoc, show 7 * 5 = 35 by rfl] at h
  rw [(show 35 * n ≡ 1 * n [MOD 17] from Nat.ModEq.mul_right n (by rfl)), one_mul] at h
  exact h.trans (by rfl)

have h : 35 * n % 17 = 5 := by rw [← mul_assoc, Nat.mul_mod, h₀]; rfl
  rwa [Nat.mul_mod, show 35 % 17 = 1 by rfl, one_mul, Nat.mod_mod] at h

rw [← Nat.modEq_iff_mod_eq] at h₀ ⊢
  calc n ≡ 1 * n [MOD 17] := by rw [one_mul]
    _ ≡ 35 * n [MOD 17] := Nat.ModEq.mul_right n (by rfl)
    _ ≡ 7 * (5 * n) [MOD 17] := by rw [mul_assoc]; rfl
    _ ≡ 7 * 8 [MOD 17] := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 7 h₀
    _ ≡ 5 [MOD 17] := by rfl

  change 7 * 5 * n % 17 = 5
  rw [mul_assoc, Nat.mul_mod, h₀]

  change 7 * 5 * n % 17 = 5

  simp at h₀
  linear_combination 7 * h₀

rw [← one_mul n, show 1 = 7 * 5 % 17 by rfl, Nat.mul_mod_left, mul_assoc, ← Nat.mul_mod_right, h₀]
  rfl

  rw [← ZMod.val_nat_cast, ← one_mul (n : ZMod 17), ← show (7 : ZMod 17) * 5 = 1 by rfl]
  rw [mul_assoc, this]

    _ = 7 * (5 * n) % 17 := by rw [show 35 = 7 * 5 by rfl, mul_assoc]

have : 35 * n % 17 = n % 17 := by

    _ = 7 * (5 * n % 17) % 17 := by rw [Nat.mul_mod_right]
    _ = 7 * 8 % 17 := by rw [h₀]

    _ = 7 * 8 % 17 := by rw [Nat.mul_mod, show 7 % 17 = 7 by rfl, h₀]
